Reworked Martha's breakfast confrontation into more concrete, pressured speech rooted in bodies, food, school tasks, and the endangered first-years. The revised lines keep her high contraction use, add repetition and mild profanity under strain, and remove the previously aphoristic diagnosis cadence.
